message:
fix(tests): fix flaky global_queue_contention and steal_deterministic tests

global_queue_contention: drain leftover items from concurrent phase
before asserting push/pop still works.

steal_deterministic: use separate queue sets so first steal doesn't
mutate queues used by second steal, which caused non-deterministic
results despite same RNG seed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
